mapper.sql: id, flow_id, node_name, node_code, node_type, approver_role_code, description, status, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_flow_node WHERE flow_id = #{flowId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_flow_node (flow_id, node_name, node_code, node_type, approver_role_code, description, status, sort) VALUES (#{flowId}, #{nodeName}, #{nodeCode}, #{nodeType}, #{approverRoleCode}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_flow_node SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE flow_id = #{flowId} AND deleted = 0
